channel.title: paper on syang's blog
channel.description: Recent content in paper on syang's blog

item.title: S&P 2020 IJON
item.description: S&P 2020 - IJON: Exploring Deep State Spaces via Fuzzing 论文链接：https://www.syssec.ruhr-uni-bochum.de/media/emma/veroef

item.title: S&P19 Asm2Vec
item.description: S&P 2019 - Asm2Vec: Boosting Static Representation Robustness for Binary Clone Search against Code Obfuscation and Compiler Optimization 论文链接：https://www.computer.org/csdl/proceedings-artic

item.title: SOSP 2019 TSVD
item.description: SOSP - 2019 - Efficient Scalable Thread-Safety-Violation Detection - Finding thousands of concurrency bugs during testing 论文链接：https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/research/uploads/

item.title: EuroSys 2019 LockDoc
item.description: EuroSys - 2019 - LockDoc: Trace-Based Analysis of Locking in the Linux Kernel 摘要 关注的问题：对 kernel 开发者来说，开发文档上关于锁的使用的介绍是不全面的，有时还会有出错的可能，最终会导致相关的 bug 出
